scripts.dev: bun run --filter leadtype build && bun run docs:generate && PORTLESS_PORT=443 PORTLESS_HTTPS=1 portless run vite dev
scripts.build: bun run --filter leadtype build && bun run docs:generate && vite build
scripts.preview: PORTLESS_PORT=443 PORTLESS_HTTPS=1 portless run vite preview
scripts.check-types: bun run --filter leadtype build && bun run docs:generate && svelte-kit sync && svelte-check --tsconfig ./tsconfig.json
